en: Praise the LORD! Praise, O servants of the LORD, praise the name of the LORD!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 耶和華的僕人哪！你們要讚美， 要讚美耶和華的名。

en: Blessed be the name of the LORD from this time forth and forevermore!
zh: 耶和華的名是應當稱頌的， 從現在直到永遠。

en: From the rising of the sun to its setting, the name of the LORD is to be praised!
zh: 從日出之地到日落之處， 耶和華的名都該受讚美。

en: The LORD is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens!
zh: 耶和華高過萬國， 他的榮耀超越諸天。

en: Who is like the LORD our God, who is seated on high,
zh: 誰像耶和華我們的 神呢？ 他坐在至高之處，

en: who looks far down on the heavens and the earth?
zh: 他俯首垂顧天上和地下的事。

en: He raises the poor from the dust and lifts the needy from the ash heap,
zh: 他從灰塵中抬舉貧寒人， 從糞堆中提拔窮乏人，

en: to make them sit with princes, with the princes of his people.
zh: 使他們和權貴同坐， 就是和他子民中的權貴同坐，

en: He gives the barren woman a home, making her the joyous mother of children. Praise the LORD!
zh: 他使不能生育的婦人安居家中， 成了有許多兒女的快樂母親。 你們要讚美耶和華。
